markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing William Leborgne for an Account Director role.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proven Organic Growth Engine:** At AirDNA, William grew blog traffic from 6k to 32k visits/mo and shifted the branded:non-branded traffic mix from 80:20 to 55:45, reducing brand reliance.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**AI-Driven Efficiency:** Used AirOps to cut content budget by 75% while increasing production. Developed a unique localization workflow that first checks for cultural/legal fit before translating.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** Proposed a "2 Bets + 20% Swings" model to balance long-term SEO with short-term wins via cross-channel distribution (email, paid).](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=2955.0)
  - [**GrowthX Fit:** Actively sought out GrowthX for its AI-native culture and peer collaboration, which he lacks in his current senior individual contributor role.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=1971.0)

## Topics

### Challenge: Stalled Organic Engine at AirDNA

  - [**Problem:** AirDNA's organic engine was stalled and over-reliant on branded traffic (80:20 branded:non-branded mix).](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [**Mandate:** "Right the ship" and grow non-paid channels to lower CAC.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### Solution: AI-Powered Organic Growth

  - [**Blog Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [Grew organic visits from 6k to 32k/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
      - [Shifted traffic mix to a healthier 55:45 branded:non-branded.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Drives 11% of core business registrations and subscriptions.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [**High-Impact Projects:**](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
      - [**Programmatic Pages (70k):** City-specific data pages drive \~25% of organic registrations.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Airbnb Calculator:** A high-utility tool for estimating rental income.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [**AI-Driven Efficiency:**](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [Used AirOps to cut content budget by 75% while increasing production.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
      - [Built 20+ workflows, including a unique localization process:](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
        1.  [**Cultural/Legal Check:** Verifies content suitability for the target market.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
        2.  [**Local Optimization:** Rewrites the article for local keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
        3.  [**Data Integration:** Merges key data points from the original English article.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [This workflow enables one French and one Spanish reviewer to manage 22 and 16 articles/mo, respectively.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### New Challenge: Winning in AI Search

  - [**Problem:** AI Overviews (AIOs) are causing click-through rates (CTRs) to plummet (e.g., from 2.4% to 0.8%).](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**Response:**](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Developed a 2026 playbook for winning in AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Experimenting with new content formats (e.g., micro-content, multi-answer articles) to increase LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [Repurposing content across channels (e.g., 109 YouTube videos from top blogs) to diversify traffic sources.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Proposed Solution: Strategic Framework for GrowthX

  - [**Problem:** GrowthX needs a more repeatable framework to communicate strategy and value, moving beyond a "busy shop" perception.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=2821.0)
  - [**Proposed Framework:**](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=2955.0)
      - [**"2 Bets" (80% Capacity):** High-conviction, strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=2955.0)
      - [**"20% Swings" (20% Capacity):** Experiments that can become future "Bets."](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=2955.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This structure provides a clear narrative for clients, connecting activities to objectives and demonstrating proactive value.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=2901.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Recruiting Team:** Contact William Leborgne to schedule the next interview.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=3487.0)
  - [**Kyle Gaudreau:** Provide interview feedback to the recruiting team.](https://fathom.video/share/S7Mfv9uz2uvzpMH-nusy-Tzxj_rTNxy4?tab=summary&timestamp=3487.0)
